name: RM Sate Anda Kali Abang
excerpt_id: Kuliner sate kambing muda legendaris sejak 1978 yang terkenal dengan bumbu rempah melimpah dan tekstur daging super empuk.
excerpt: A legendary tender lamb satay culinary spot since 1978, renowned for its rich traditional spices and incredibly juicy texture.

name: Nasi Uduk Bang Bule (Mayor Oking)
excerpt_id: Surga kuliner malam legendaris yang menyajikan nasi uduk pulen gurih dengan pilihan lauk empal, semur, dan gorengan sejak era 90-an.
excerpt: A legendary night culinary haven serving savory, fluffy coconut rice with various side dishes like sweet beef, stews, and fritters since the 90s.

name: Nasi Bebek Bulak Kapal Pahlawan
excerpt_id: Sajian kuliner bebek goreng khas Madura ikonik dengan siraman bumbu hitam pekat gurih-pedas dan taburan serundeng kelapa yang wangi.
excerpt: An iconic Madurese fried duck culinary spot featuring savory-spicy thick black spices poured over tender meat and topped with fragrant grated coconut.

name: Bebek Ella Pekayon
excerpt_id: Destinasi kuliner bebek legendaris di Pekayon yang eksis sejak 1997, terkenal dengan kelembutan dagingnya dan sambal korek yang super pedas.
excerpt: A legendary duck culinary destination in Pekayon operating since 1997, famous for its melt-in-your-mouth texture and extremely spicy red chili paste.

name: Ayam Panggang Pak Tarwud
excerpt_id: Restoran ayam panggang bumbu meresap bertekstur juicy andalan warga lokal yang menyajikan cita rasa gurih-manis tradisional yang otentik.
excerpt: A local favorite roasted chicken joint serving intensely marinated, juicy meat packed with authentic, traditional savory-sweet flavors.

name: Raja Sunda Bekasi
excerpt_id: Restoran Sunda terbesar di jalan utama Bekasi yang menawarkan konsep makan lesehan nyaman dengan menu andalan Gurame Terbang dan Nasi Tutug Oncom.
excerpt: The largest Sundanese restaurant on Bekasi's main avenue, offering cozy floor-seating dining with signature Flying Gourami and Tutug Oncom rice.

name: Gubug Makan Mang Engking Summarecon
excerpt_id: Sensasi makan keluarga di atas pondok gubuk parahyangan terapung di tengah kota dengan menu andalan Udang Bakar Madu yang melegenda.
excerpt: A family dining sensation set in floating traditional Sundanese bamboo huts in the city center, famous for its legendary Honey Grilled Prawns.

name: Kampung Kecil Pekayon
excerpt_id: Restoran keluarga tematik Sunda dengan deretan pondokan bambu bersih, rapi, dan estetik, menyajikan aneka olahan hidangan nusantara yang lezat.
excerpt: A thematic Sundanese family restaurant lined with clean, neat, and aesthetic bamboo gazebos, serving a delicious variety of archipelago dishes.

name: SHSD Sambel Hejo Sambel Dadak (Kamala Lagoon)
excerpt_id: Tempat bersantap ayam goreng basah khas Sunda yang gurih berpadu dengan kesegaran Sambel Hejo dan Sambel Dadak pedas instan.
excerpt: A dining spot serving savory Sundanese-style moist fried chicken paired perfectly with fresh Green Chili Paste and spicy raw freshly-made sambal.

name: SAMEDJA (Stadion Patriot)
excerpt_id: Restoran konsep prasmanan Sunda modern berdesain elegan yang menyediakan area bermain anak serta ruang pertemuan privat serbaguna.
excerpt: A modern Sundanese buffet restaurant boasting an elegant interior design, equipped with kids' play areas and versatile private meeting rooms.

category: Olahan Daging Ekstrem, Sate & Bakso Viral
name: Sop Janda Jawa Sunda (Pekayon)
excerpt_id: Pelopor kuliner sop iga sapi kuah cabai caplak hijau utuh super pedas yang menyegarkan dan menggugah selera para pencinta makanan pedas.
excerpt: The pioneer of ultra-spicy beef rib soup brewed with whole green bird's eye chilies, offering a refreshing and fiery kick for spicy food lovers.

category: Olahan Daging Ekstrem, Sate & Bakso Viral
name: Bakso Rusuk Joss (Mustikajaya)
excerpt_id: Pusat kreasi kuliner bakso unik pencipta tren bakso lava raksasa berkuah pedas membara yang viral di berbagai platform media sosial.
excerpt: The creative hub of unique meatball culinary creations, famous as the trendsetter for the viral giant lava meatball served in a fiery spicy broth.

category: Olahan Daging Ekstrem, Sate & Bakso Viral
name: Bakso Titoti Cabang Bekasi
excerpt_id: Destinasi andalan pencinta bakso urat tradisional khas Wonogiri berkuah kaldu murni yang gurih, pekat, dan bertabur tetelan sapi melimpah.
excerpt: The go-to destination for authentic Wonogiri traditional tendon meatballs served in a rich, savory pure bone broth topped with abundant beef fat cuts.

category: Olahan Daging Ekstrem, Sate & Bakso Viral
name: Sego Cumi Dapur Si Mpok (Bekasi Selatan)
excerpt_id: Kuliner nasi campur beralas daun pisang dengan lauk cumi hitam meresap yang gurih dan sambal korek pedas gurih berharga merakyat.
excerpt: A pocket-friendly culinary spot serving banana-leaf rice platters topped with rich savory black squid and fiery, well-seasoned garlic chili paste.

category: Olahan Daging Ekstrem, Sate & Bakso Viral
name: Sate & Tongseng Pak H. Budi (Solo)
excerpt_id: Rumah makan tongseng dan sate kambing legendaris kaya rempah yang mempertahankan resep rahasia asli Solo sejak tahun 1985.
excerpt: A legendary lamb tongseng and satay eatery rich in herbs, strictly preserving its secret authentic Solo heritage recipe since 1985.

name: Bandar Djakarta Bekasi
excerpt_id: Restoran seafood terbesar berkonsep pasar ikan hidup terapung di mana pengunjung bisa memilih langsung komoditas laut segar dari akuarium.
excerpt: The largest seafood restaurant utilizing a floating live fish market concept where diners can handpick fresh marine catches directly from aquariums.

name: Aroem Resto & Cafe Bekasi
excerpt_id: Restoran gastronomi premium yang menyajikan menu Nusantara kelas atas berlatar pemandangan langsung ke tepi danau BCBD Summarecon.
excerpt: A premium gastronomy restaurant serving upscale Indonesian dishes set against a direct scenic backdrop of the Summarecon BCBD lakeside view.

name: Amanaia Grand Kota Bintang (Ex Talaga Sampireun)
excerpt_id: Destinasi kuliner keluarga premium di tepi danau buatan indah dengan bangunan arsitektur modern beratap tinggi yang megah.
excerpt: A premium family culinary destination nestled on the edges of a scenic artificial lake, boasting a grand modern high-ceilinged architecture.

name: Seribu Rasa Summarecon Bekasi
excerpt_id: Restoran bersuasana elegan dan luks yang mengusung menu mahakarya kuliner Asia dan Nusantara kelas atas untuk perjamuan formal.
excerpt: An elegant and luxurious dining venue presenting high-end Asian and Indonesian culinary masterpieces tailored for formal banquets.

name: Double U Steak by Chef Widhi
excerpt_id: Restoran steak berkualitas premium buatan koki selebritas dengan saus racikan sendiri bergaya industrial urban yang nyaman.
excerpt: A premium-quality steakhouse curated by a celebrity chef, featuring signature homemade sauces within a cozy urban industrial-themed room.

name: MAKAN BAWAH POHON (Jatisampurna)
excerpt_id: Kuliner masakan rumahan asri berlatar kebun teduh dengan fasilitas playground anak yang luas, ideal untuk piknik keluarga.
excerpt: A lush home-cooked culinary spot set in a shaded garden with a spacious children's playground area, ideal for relaxed family picnics.

name: Tsamara Resto & Creative Space
excerpt_id: Konsep restoran kebun tropis estetik unik yang menawarkan fasilitas bersantap dalam tenda piknik modern di atas rumput hijau.
excerpt: A uniquely aesthetic tropical garden restaurant concept offering modern dining experiences inside picnic tents on pristine green lawns.

name: Sauciko (Saung Cikunir Kopi)
excerpt_id: Tempat bersantap semi-outdoor di bawah bangunan atap rumbia tepi perairan tenang, menyajikan harmoni alam yang menenangkan jiwa.
excerpt: A semi-outdoor dining venue under thatched roofs on the edge of calm waters, serving a peaceful nature harmony that relaxes the soul.

name: Tapak Djati Bekasi (Mustikajaya)
excerpt_id: Rumah makan keluarga bertema kompleks joglo kebun tradisional jawa kuno yang rindang, luas, dan ramah rombongan besar.
excerpt: A family eatery themed as a shaded, vast traditional Javanese joglo garden compound that is highly welcoming for large group gatherings.

name: Omah Anglo Bekasi (Jakasampurna)
excerpt_id: Rumah makan tradisional penyedia kuliner bakmi jawa otentik yang dimasak menggunakan metode tungku arang tradisional beraroma khas.
excerpt: A traditional dining house serving authentic Javanese noodles slow-cooked over heritage charcoal clay stoves for a distinct smoky aroma.

category: Kafe Estetik & Tempat Nongkrong Hits Urban
name: Koma Junkyard
excerpt_id: Kafe luar ruangan artistik yang memanfaatkan barang-barang antik bekas daur ulang menjadi dekorasi estetik instagramable beriring live music.
excerpt: An artistic outdoor cafe utilizing upcycled vintage scraps into aesthetic, instagrammable decors accompanied by live music entertainment.

category: Kafe Estetik & Tempat Nongkrong Hits Urban
name: Little Korea Grand Galaxy
excerpt_id: Pusat kuliner jajanan kaki lima bertema estetik warna-warni cerah yang mengadopsi atmosfer distrik street food populer di Kota Seoul.
excerpt: A culinary enclave of street food snacks sporting bright, colorful layouts that capture the lively atmosphere of Seoul's popular food districts.
